title: Is the claimant still working for the organisation or person they're making a claim against? (optional)
legend: Is the claimant still working for the organisation or person they're making a claim against? (optional)
optionText1: Yes, they're still working for the respondent
optionText2: Yes, they're working a notice period for the respondent
optionText3: No, they're no longer working for the respondent

isStillWorking.required: Tell us if the claimant is still working for the organisation or person
